---
pagetitle: "Welcome!"
---
<h1>Hi, I'm <span class="gradient_text">John Baker</span>. 👋 </h1>
<p>I'm a data analyst who believes understanding your data changes what's possible. My work is in K–12 education — helping the people who run schools make sense of their numbers and act on them, so every student gets what they need.</p>
<p><a href="about" title="Learn More"><button type="button" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Learn More</button></a></p>
